title: Claude Just Changed How Enterprises Work Forever (Claude Tag)
summary: Cyril Imhof discusses Claude Tag, a new feature from Anthropic described as transformative for enterprise work. The video covers Claude Tag, SaaS market dynamics, and open source developments in China, with reference to Anthropic's official announcement.
writeup: Cyril Imhof walks through Claude Tag, a new Anthropic feature aimed at enterprise workflows, and situates it against broader industry conditions. The coverage extends to SaaS market dynamics and open source developments coming out of China. Recurring threads include prompt engineering, enterprise AI deployment, and model capabilities.
